first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning across both evaluations is fundamentally the same, focusing on the candidate being overqualified and lacking German language skills for a role in Berlin. The minor differences in phrasing in the strengths and concerns sections are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not introduce any new logic or concerns related to the candidate's location change.
